name: Beef Flank Steak with Mushroom Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 ounces) mushroom pieces, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flank steak on both sides with salt and pepper.
2. Spread one side of the steak with Dijon mustard.
3. Prepare the stuffing by heating oil in a frying pan.
4. Add onion and cook for 3 minutes until lightly browned.
5. Add mushrooms and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in parsley, chives, tomato paste, and bread crumbs.
7. Season the stuffing with salt, pepper, and paprika.
8. Spread the stuffing on the mustard side of the steak.
9. Roll up the steak jelly-roll style and tie securely with string or thread.
10. Prepare the gravy by cooking bacon in a Dutch oven or heavy casserole until partially done.
11. Add the meat roll to the pan and brown all sides, about 10 minutes.
12. Add onions and sauté for 5 minutes.
13. Pour in beef broth; cover the pot.
14. Simmer for 1 hour.
15. Remove the meat to a preheated platter.
16. Season the pan juices with mustard, salt, and pepper.
17. Stir in catsup.
18. Serve the gravy separately.
19. Yield: 6 servings.
